listings.postSubtitle: Choose the type of listing you want to publish
listings.sellDesc: Find buyers and tenants for your property
listings.dailyDesc: Host guests at your place for short stays
listings.descDaily: As per the Ministry of Tourism's regulations, you must add a permit number to be able to publish the listing.
listings.descProfessional: As per the real estate brokerage regulations, you must add an advertisement license to be able to publish it.
listings.helpLink: How to get an Ad License?
listings.permitTip: Secure validation via Ministry of Tourism API (Coming Soon)
listings.successDesc: Thank you for providing your {type} Number. Our compliance team will review your credentials manually.
listings.step1Desc: REGA issues the FAL License which certifies agents to practice brokerage.
listings.step2Desc: Licensed brokers issue a contract with the owner via official REGA website.
listings.step3Desc: Brokerage contract is used to secure an ad license to advertise.
listings.licenseTip: You can get one through Bayut, starting from SAR 250.

chat.title: AI Property Assistant
chat.subtitle: Tell me what you're looking for and I'll find the perfect match
chat.welcome: Welcome! I'm your AI property assistant. Tell me about your ideal property in Saudi Arabia — your budget, preferred city, and what type of property you're looking for.
chat.offline: Our assistant is temporarily unavailable. Tell us what you're looking for and a broker will follow up personally.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From search to keys in three simple steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Chat with our AI assistant about your dream property — budget, location, type, and timeline.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI matches you with properties that fit your exact criteria and ranks them by relevance.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Qualified leads go directly to verified brokers who already understand what you need.

cta.brokerSubtitle: Get qualified leads with context. No more 150 cold calls for 1 deal.

listingsPage.regaComplianceDesc: Ensure your listings are verified by uploading valid deeds and advertising licenses as required by the Saudi Real Estate Authority.
listingsPage.boostVisibilityDesc: Upgrade your properties to 'Featured' status to appear at the top of search results and in city spotlights.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Leading the future of Saudi real estate with AI
about.missionText: We aim to simplify property discovery in Saudi Arabia using cutting-edge AI.
about.visionText: To be the most trusted platform connecting buyers and verified brokers instantly.
about.heroSubtitle: Empowering real estate decisions across the Kingdom
about.visionTextExtended: We strive to create an ecosystem where finding, buying, and selling property is as seamless as a click, guided by verified data and AI-driven insights to ensure transparency at every step.
about.missionTextExtended: By bridging the gap between buyers and sellers with advanced technology, we help real estate professionals grow their business while providing consumers with unparalleled peace of mind.
about.regaVerifiedDesc: Every professional on our network is licensed and verified to guarantee trust.
about.kingdomReachDesc: From NEOM to the vibrant heart of Riyadh, we cover all corners of Saudi Arabia.
about.communityFirstDesc: Built by local experts, for local experts, keeping the community's needs at the core.
about.bannerDesc: We are deeply committed to Saudi Vision 2030, enhancing digital transformation in real estate through intelligent matching, secure transactions, and verified authenticity.
about.historyDesc: Since our inception, we have been dedicated to revolutionizing the Saudi real estate sector. What started as a small initiative to connect local buyers with trusted sellers has grown into a Kingdom-wide network powered by cutting-edge technology.
about.whyChooseUsDesc: We combine local expertise with global standards. Our platform leverages AI to provide the most accurate property valuations, neighborhood insights, and seamless transaction experiences in the market.
about.commitmentDesc: Transparency, security, and innovation are the pillars of our operation. We are committed to maintaining the highest standards of data protection and listing verification to ensure every user feels confident and secure.

packages.title: Premium Packages
packages.subtitle: Choose the right plan to boost your leads
packages.enterpriseDesc: For large brokerages needing unlimited scale
packages.heroTitle: Get a business package and enjoy premium benefits
packages.heroSubtitle: Purchase credits to seamlessly post listings and utilize signature services.
packages.whatCanYouDo: What can you do with credits?
packages.featureBasicDesc: Standard visibility in search results. Costs 10 credits per post.
packages.featureHotDesc: Gain 3x more visibility than basic listings. Costs 40 credits.
packages.featureSignatureDesc: Top of search, maximum exposure. Costs 100 credits.
packages.featureAllocationDesc: Distribute your bundle perfectly among your staff members.
packages.featureRefreshDesc: Bump your listing back to the top by spending 5 credits.
